programmes.show_description: Indulge yourself in our collection of fine, exquisite jewellery. Each piece in our glamorous selection epitomises the height of luxury. Go on, you deserve it!

Start your day with Live Well: The Morning Show. Discover uplifting tips, wellness inspiration, and must-have products to energise your morning and boost your wellbeing.
Join Katy and our trusted stylists and fashion experts as we help you create your perfect wardrobe, showing you how to bring key pieces and different looks together to showcase your personal style.
Indulge yourself in our collection of fine, exquisite jewellery. Each piece in our glamorous selection epitomises the height of luxury. Go on, you deserve it!
Join us for My Hair Doctor from Guy Parsons, an industry professional whose knowledge of hair and scalp health, plus his hairdressing skills has enabled him to create this premium haircare range.
Join us for an array of exciting Easter offers, ranging from fabulous fashion must-haves to stylish accessories. At prices you'll love, you won't want to miss out on these deals!
Unveil your chic side with Sosandar! Discover flattering, trendy designs created for real life with longer lengths and unique styles to make you feel sexy, feminine, and confident.
Live well every day with QVC. Discover inspiring products, expert tips and wellness essentials to help you feel your best, inside and out.

Prai is a ginger-like root that has been harvested in the tropical forests of Thailand for more than 1000 years. This range of prestige skincare combines traditional wisdom with the latest technology.
Continuing the extravaganza celebrating the timeless beauty of Diamonds. Join us as we view at least 60 truly dazzling designs, ranging from subtle to breathtaking and classic to contemporary.
Unlock haircare secrets with Scandinavian BioLabs. Join Alison Young for expert advice and discover innovative solutions for stronger, healthier-looking hair.
Nakery Beauty delivers clean, high-performance skincare and bodycare designed to empower confidence at every age.
Indulge yourself in our collection of fine, exquisite jewellery. Each piece in our glamorous selection epitomises the height of luxury. Go on, you deserve it!
This show features a wide range of beauty products for your body, face, hair and nails, plus a selection of make-up. Plus our top beauty experts will be on hand to give you great advice and tips.

The Prime Fifty range features nutritional supplements tailored specifically to the needs of the over 50s and beyond, helping you to have the time of your life in the prime of your life.

Join designer Kim Mendelson as she presents her latest lines. Daytime chic to evening sophistication, weekend comfort to party glamour, the Kim & Co collection is designed for every aspect of life.
